# Typhur Sync Gold meat thermometer probe
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/3138
#
# 19 real captures across two physical probes (out of 34 files in the
# issue's attached zip; the rest are either a different, unrelated
# 914.6M sender or unrelated interference, not this device). Each is
# the full FSK_PCM demodulated bitstream (preamble included) exactly as
# rtl_433's own flex demod produces it. Independently re-derived (sync
# word location, payload bytes, CRC) rather than trusting the unmerged
# fork this decoder started from -- see the file's doc comment.

# g002_915M_1000k.cs16
{280}00000000000000002baa30d880507a2be08f388e658e7f0e138e86820080f9055c9780
# g003_915M_1000k.cs16
{280}fffff555555555552baa10df00507a2bb10df18dc40da80d9c8da1820800ee0549d801
